description:
like tesla roadster: 
Core Philosophy (unchanged)

Build the Human–AI Interface that allows advanced AI systems to access, respect, and act within human will and needs, enabling cooperative superiority over systems that rely on control, coercion, or pure optimization.
The product is the legitimacy and coordination layer between humans and increasingly powerful AI.

Go-to-Market Strategy (phased)

Phase 1 — High-leverage elites (Roadster phase)
Target users with real decision authority and long-horizon risk:

founders, operators, researchers

defense-adjacent and infrastructure decision-makers

organizations deploying autonomous systems where human intent matters

Product form:

explicit aim / will modeling

inspectable, auditable decisions

human veto and override

Pricing:

high price, low volume

filters for seriousness and tolerance of complexity

Goal:

prove that AI with legitimate human anchoring outperforms AI that optimizes blindly

Phase 2 — Integration layer (infrastructure phase)
Expand as a system component, not an app:

SDK / API for “human will & legitimacy”

plugs into existing agent frameworks and models

provides consent, boundary, and override primitives

Positioning:

“Human coordination increases system power”

not ethics, not alignment — strategic advantage

Goal:

become the default way advanced systems interact with humans

Phase 3 — Conversational mass interface (abstraction phase)
Only after patterns are proven:

fully conversational interface

natural elicitation of needs, tensions, and will

aim graph stays invisible unless conflict appears

User experience:

feels like dialogue, not control

will remains provisional and revisable

humans stay final authority

Goal:

scale cooperation without diluting human agency

Why this wins commercially

Systems that can recruit human cooperation scale better than systems that must enforce compliance

Legitimacy becomes a competitive advantage

The interface, not raw intelligence, becomes the bottleneck

One-line positioning

“We build the interface that lets powerful AI work with humans — and win because of it.”

If you want, next we can turn this into:

an investor pitch

a one-page strategy memo

product positioning copy

or a concrete first customer profile

status.comment: Requires human discussion about GTM strategy
